2113750.name: Freedom Squid Fighter
2113750.description:
Take control of a heavily armed, freedom-loving squid and blast your way through destructible worlds. Soar through the air, tunnel through dirt and rock with powerful weaponry, and outmaneuver enemies across towering landscapes.

Every level is a playground of destruction — carve your own paths, uncover hidden areas, and rain chaos from above. Collect resources, swap weapons on the fly, and adapt your tactics to survive intense encounters.

Features

  • Fully destructible terrain – Make your own routes, uncover secrets, and obliterate anything in your way.

  • Fluid aerial movement – Hover, weave, and dodge while firing in any direction.

  • Dynamic combat – Master multiple weapon types, from rapid-fire blasters to heavy-hitting explosives.

  • Challenging vertical levels – Conquer towering cliffs, deep caverns, and wide-open skies.

  • Collect and upgrade – Gather resources to enhance your squid’s combat potential.

Freedom isn’t given — it’s taken. Tentacle by tentacle.
2113750.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
